name: Cherry Almond Cream Dessert
recipeIngredient: 10 ounces low-fat pound cake, cut into ten slices
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine the sweetened condensed milk, water, pudding mix, and almond extract.
2. Mix until well blended.
3. Fold in the whipped topping.
4. Spoon half of the mixture into a 13 x 9-inch pan.
5. Top with cake slices, pie filling, and remaining cream mixture.
6. Chill until ready to serve.
